name: Secret Seven
original_name: Secret Seven เธอคนเหงากับเขาทั้งเจ็ด
overview: This is the story of Padlom, a lonely girl who's afraid of love. However one day, someone told her that a guy secretly likes her, and this guy is supposed to be among these seven young men! Follow Padlom's passionate love story, and how will Padlom find out which of the seven guys is secretly in love with her?

trailers.title: Secret Seven 神秘的七 Official Trailer
